---
title: Privacy Policy
summary: How business information, credentials, and access are handled, protected, and removed when no longer needed.
order: 4
---

# MarketForge Privacy Policy

## Overview

MarketForge is committed to protecting your business data and handling all information responsibly.

---

## Information Collected

* business information
* campaign data
* lead and revenue data
* system usage data

---

## Use of Information

Used to:

* operate the platform
* execute actions
* track performance
* improve recommendations

---

## Third-Party Access

Execution may require access to:

* Google Business Profile
* websites
* social platforms
* review platforms

---

## Credential Handling

If credentials are provided:

* used only for execution
* limited to authorized personnel
* never shared or sold
* retained only as long as needed

---

## Data Retention

MarketForge will:

* delete credentials when no longer required
* remove access upon cancellation
* remove access when automation replaces manual execution

---

## Security

Reasonable safeguards are used to protect data.

---

## Contact

[marketforgelabs@gmail.com](mailto:marketforgelabs@gmail.com)
